resources.string: This device environment is not trusted
Nofy blocks access when the app appears to be running in a high-risk environment. This helps protect encrypted notes and local credentials on this device.
Remove the risky condition and relaunch the app. Release builds do not run on rooted, tampered, or actively debugged environments.
A debugger is attached to the process.
The installed app is unexpectedly debuggable.
The device firmware is signed with test keys.
Root-related binaries or Magisk artifacts were detected.
A known root management package was detected.
